title: Carpe Musicam! takes Mossel Bay on musical journey
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The talented orchestra and choir of Carpe Musicam! put on a musical concert in the Mossel Bay Town Hall, titled The Rest of the Best!, on Sunday 19 October.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The talented orchestra and choir of Carpe Musicam! put on a musical concert in the Mossel Bay Town Hall, titled The Rest of the Best!, on Sunday 19 October."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Before the music began, the group invited the audience to clap along and join the fun, filling the room with a buzzing energy."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Under the direction of conductor Norman Carless, and with Elsabe Barkhuizen as the main organiser, the orchestra and choir performed a diverse musical repertoire.","html":"Under the direction of conductor Norman Carless, and with Elsabe Barkhuizen as the main organiser, the orchestra and choir performed a diverse musical repertoire."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Instruments ranging from violins and bass clarinets to various flutes created a rich tapestry of sound.","html":"Instruments ranging from violins and bass clarinets to various flutes created a rich tapestry of sound."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The programme featured music for every taste and generation - from upbeat, jolly tunes to softer, more reflective pieces. Highlights included “Dancing Queen” by ABBA, a playful rendition of “The Pink Panther” theme and selections that transported the audience from Western classics to cinematic adventures.","html":"The programme featured music for every taste and generation - from upbeat, jolly tunes to softer, more reflective pieces. Highlights included “Dancing Queen” by ABBA, a playful rendition of “The Pink Panther” theme and selections that transported the audience from Western classics to cinematic adventures."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The stirring theme from the film How to Train Your Dragon whisked listeners away on a musical journey across the globe with its Nordic-inspired melodies."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The ensemble’s next concert will be a festive Christmas special, titled The Best of Christmas, taking place in Sedgefield, George and Mossel Bay on 7, 12 and 14 December respectively. Tickets are available on www.carpemusicam.co.za.","html":"The ensemble’s next concert will be a festive Christmas special, titled The Best of Christmas, taking place in Sedgefield, George and Mossel Bay on 7, 12 and 14 December respectively. Tickets are available on www.carpemusicam.co.za. "},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
